Inquisitor.name: Inquisitor
Inquisitor.equipped_with: An Inquisitor is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: An Inquisitor cannot be the mandatory choice for the HQ slot.
Can be upgraded to a psyker for +5 points.
One Inquisitor per army can be upgraded to an Inquisitor Lord for +10 points.

abilities: Command squad
Psyker: A psyker can cast 1 psychic power and dispel 1 psychic power per round. A psyker knows Smite, as well as one psychic power from a chosen psychic discipline.

Inquisitorial requisiton: The Inquisitor got additional access to a single weapon or wargear item from any Imperial faction. Requirements like specific traits or "Only for xy" must still be met. Wargear that got the same description or ability like an item from their own armory can't be taken.
Inquisitor Lord: The Inquisitor Lord may purchase one additional item from any Imperial faction.

Arbites.name: Arbites
Arbites.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Arbites combat shotgun; Arbites shotpistol; Frag grenade; Krak grenade.

option_groups.header: Two Arbitrators may swap their Arbites combat shotguns
Any remaining models may swap their Arbites combat shotguns

abilities: Arbites shield: The model gains "Deflect" and "Parry".

Monofilament: If the target enemy unit is in cover and at least one hit has been scored with the weapon, the terrain counts as difficult and dangerous terrain until the end of the next activation of the target unit.

Ordo Hereticus Warband.name: Ordo Hereticus Warband

option_groups.header: Only for armies with an Ordo Hereticus Inquisitor.
A warband consists of a maximum of 12 models. Each army can only contain a single warband.
Each Missionary can be equipped with an Eviscerator for +5 points.
Each Servitor can be equipped with one of the following weapons
The unit may get one of these abilities (points per model, including an attached Inquisitor)

abilities: Arco-flagellant: Every Arco-flagellant has the "Berserker(5+)" and "Blind rage" special ability.
Bodyguard: Every Acolyte has the "Bodyguard" special ability.
Devout: A Missionary can recite 1 hymn per turn. A hymn is successfully recited on a roll of 3+. A missionary knows a prayer from the hymns of battle.

Narthecium: Once per turn, the damage of a wound against the model or attached unit can be reduced by 1. The ability must be declared after armor and invulnerability saves. Does not work against weapons with a strength of 8 or above.
Pariah: While a Penitent is alive, the unit gains the "Aegis(4+)" special ability.
Servitor: As long as the Inquisitor is alive, Servitors get +1 to hit rolls.
Wise Guidance: While a Sage is alive in the unit, all weapons in the unit gain Deflagration(5+).

Ordo Malleus Warband.name: Ordo Malleus Warband

option_groups.header: Only for armies with an Ordo Malleus Inquisitor.
A warband consists of a maximum of 12 models. Each army can only contain a single warband.
Each Excorcist can be equipped with an Eviscerator for +5 points.
Each Servitor can be equipped with one of the following weapons
The unit may get one of these abilities (points per model, including an attached Inquisitor)

abilities: Aura of Faith: While an Exorcist is alive in the unit, all models gain a 5+ invulnerability save against melee weapons.
Bodyguard: Every Acolyte has the "Bodyguard" special ability.
Jokaero Digital Weapons: All Jokaero in the squad can fire the same weapon each round: Heavy flamer, Lascannon, Multi-melta. All weapons fired by a Jokaero have the "Assault" type.
Psionic Flare: A friendly unit arriving via deep strike does not scatter when set up within 6" of the Mystic. Increase the range by 6" for each additional Mystic.
Psyker: A Psyker can cast 1 psychic power and dispel 1 psychic power per round. A Psyker knows Smite, as well as one psychic power from a chosen psychic discipline.
Servitor: As long as the Inquisitor is alive, Servitors get +1 to hit rolls.
Warp shield: While the Daemonhost is alive in the unit, all models gain a 5+ invulnerability save against ranged weapons.

Ordo Xenos Warband.name: Ordo Xenos Warband

option_groups.header: Only for armies with an Ordo Xenos Inquisitor.
A warband consists of a maximum of 12 models. Each army can only contain a single warband.
Each Servitor can be equipped with one of the following weapons
The unit may get one of these abilities (points per model, including an attached Inquisitor)

abilities: Archaeotech Enhancement: While an Archaeotech Researcher is alive in the unit, all weapons in the unit gain Armor piercing(5+).
Bodyguard: Every Acolyte has the "Bodyguard" special ability.
Know Your Enemy: As long as a Xenologist is alive in the unit, it gains the "Favoured enemy" special rule against all Xeno factions.
Leadership: As long as an Alien World Scout is alive in the unit, it gains the "Use Cover" and "Move Through Cover" special rule.
Psyker: A Psyker can cast 1 psychic power and dispel 1 psychic power per round. A Psyker knows Smite, as well as one psychic power from a chosen psychic discipline.
Servitor: As long as the Inquisitor is alive, Servitors get +1 to hit rolls.

Stormtroopers.name: Stormtroopers
Stormtroopers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Frag grenade; Hot-shot lasgun; Krak grenade.

option_groups.header: For every 5 models, two Stormtroopers may swap their Hot-shot lasguns
The unit may get one of these abilities (points per model)

abilities: Sniper: Models equipped with a Sniper rifle get a +1 bonus to their BS.

Deathcult Assassins.name: Deathcult Assassins
Deathcult Assassins.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Power sword.
abilities: Deflect, Infiltrator, Parry
Lightning reflexes: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Land Raider Prometheus.name: Land Raider Prometheus
Land Raider Prometheus.equipped_with: A Land Raider is a single model and equipped with: 2 Quad heavy bolters.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with
Can be equipped with an additional Storm bolter for +11 points.

abilities: Assault ramp: Passengers can still make a 6" charge move after the vehicle moves and they exit.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models.

Corvus Blackstar.name: Corvus Blackstar
Corvus Blackstar.equipped_with: A Corvus Blackstar is equipped with: Twin assault cannon; Twin Blackstar rocket launcher.

option_groups.header: Can replace the Twin assault cannon
Can replace the Twin Blackstar rocket launcher
Can be equipped with one Hurricane bolt gun for +32 points.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Hover mode
Infernum halo-launcher: Enemy weapons do not get any bonus for "Anti-Air" abilities.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 infantry models. Cannot transport models with the "Massive" ability.

Chimera.name: Chimera
Chimera.equipped_with: A Chimera is a single model and equipped with: Two Heavy flamers; Two lasgun arrays.

option_groups.header: Can replace the Heavy flamer
Can replace the Heavy flamer

abilities: Fire hatches(2)
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 infantry models.

Rhino.name: Rhino
Rhino.equipped_with: A Rhino is a single model and equipped with: Storm bolter.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with an additional Storm bolter for +11 points.

abilities: Fire hatches(2)
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models, excluding models in Terminator armor.

Taurox.name: Taurox
Taurox.equipped_with: A Taurox is a single model and equipped with: 2 Hot-shot volley guns.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with one of the following
Can replace both Hot-shot volley guns
May be equipped with one of the following weapons

abilities: Fire hatches(2)
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models.

Valkyrie.name: Valkyrie
Valkyrie.equipped_with: A Valkyrie is equipped with: Multilaser.

option_groups.header: Can replace the Multi-laser
Can be equipped with one of the following
Can be equipped with two Heavy bolters for +36 points.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Hover mode
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 infantry models.

profiles.name: Stake
profiles.abilities: Always wounds psykers on 2+ and causes them to suffer a "Peril of the Warp" attack on a successful wounding roll.

weapons.name: Digital weapons
weapons.abilities: Extra attack, hits automatically wound the target.

weapons.name: Null rod
weapons.abilities: The model and its attached unit can't be targeted by any psychic power, including friendly ones.

weapons.name: Rad grenades
weapons.abilities: Enemy models in melee suffer a -1 to their Toughness value, if the bearer used a Charge order this turn.

weapons.name: Favoured enemy
weapons.range: The model gains the ability "Favoured enemy".

weapons.name: Furious charge
weapons.range: The model gains the ability "Furious charge".

weapons.name: Tank hunter
weapons.range: The model gains the ability "Tank hunter".

weapons.name: Terrain expert
weapons.range: The model gains the abilities "Move through cover" and "Use cover".

equipment.name: Aquila Imperialis
equipment.desc: Instead of rolling for it, the model and the attached unit can automatically pass a Leadership test once per game. Unique

equipment.name: Auspex scanner
equipment.desc: If the unit has not already activated this turn, it may immediately use up its order and fire at an enemy unit within 18" that is deployed as reinforcement as if it had been given the "Stand & Shoot" order. The attack resolves after the enemy unit has been deployed and before it takes another action.

equipment.name: Bionics
equipment.desc: The model gains a 6+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Combat shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Parry".

equipment.name: Dread reputation
equipment.desc: Enemy units within a 6" radius suffer -1 to their Leadership.

equipment.name: Esoteric knowledge ˣ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit may reroll one die per battle round.

equipment.name: Empyrian brain mines ˣ
equipment.desc: Nominate one enemy model in direct base contact during its own activation. The target must pass an Initiative test or can't attack this battle round. One use only.

equipment.name: Familiar
equipment.desc: The model may sacrifice the Familiar to reroll a psychic power manifestation test. While it is alive, the model gains +1 Initiative. Only for psykers.

equipment.name: Gamma psyker
equipment.desc: The model can manifest one additional power per activation.

equipment.name: Grimoire of True Namesᴹ
equipment.desc: One model in direct base contact suffers -1 penalties to its WS, Initiatives and Attacks, up to a minimum of 1.

equipment.name: Hexagram warding runesᴴ
equipment.desc: Enemy models in direct base contact suffer a -1 penalty to their invulnerability saves.

equipment.name: Jump pack
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Jump pack" ability.

equipment.name: Liber Heresiusᴴ
equipment.desc: The bearer may pick any two veteran abilites to be in effect for themselves and their attached unit. The veteran abilities can be changed each activation.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: No escapeᴴ
equipment.desc: Fleeing units are automatically caught up in melee and receive twice the amount of hits from each pursuing model.

equipment.name: Ordo Hereticus
equipment.desc: The model and further units from this codex get access to <Ordo Hereticus> equipment. Every model can only pick one Ordo allegiance. Only for Inquisitors.

equipment.name: Ordo Malleus
equipment.desc: The model and further units from this codex get access to <Ordo Malleus> equipment. Every model can only pick one Ordo allegiance. Only for Inquisitors.

equipment.name: Ordo Xenos
equipment.desc: The model and further units from this codex get access to <Ordo Xenos> equipment. Every model can only pick one Ordo allegiance. Only for Inquisitors.

equipment.name: Plate armour
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ save.

equipment.name: Power amor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 3+ save.

equipment.name: Praesidium Protectivaᴴ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Psyoccolum
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit may reroll all to hit dice against a psyker and its attached unit.

equipment.name: Psybolt ammunitionᴹ
equipment.desc: All ranged weapon of the model gain +1 Strength. Only works on weapons with Strength 4 or below.

equipment.name: Purified weaponᴹ
equipment.desc: Before setting up units, pick one of the purified powers below and add it to one melee weapon of the model.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Purity seal
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers suffer a -1 penalty to manifest a power when they target the model or its attached unit.

equipment.name: Refractor field
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Relic of the Ordo
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Servo skull
equipment.desc: Place a "Servo skull" token during the Rally phase of the first battle round anywhere on the battlefield. A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the token via Deep strike does not scatter. If an enemy unit moves within 12" of the token, it is removed from the game. Can be taken up to three times.

equipment.name: Special energy cells
equipment.desc: Every laser weapon of the model gains +1 damage.

equipment.name: Special issue ammunition
equipment.desc:
Every bolt weapon of the model may select one advantage per activation: 
- Seeking
- Poison(3+)
- +6" range and -1 AP

equipment.name: Spy network
equipment.desc: The army gains +1 to its initiative roll once per game. Can be chosen to apply after both sides rolled their dice for initiative.

equipment.name: Storm shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Terminator armor
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, +1 Attack, 2+ armor save, 5+ invulnerable save, and the abilities "Massive(1)," "Shock Troops," and "Unyielding." Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Tesseract labyrinthᴹ
equipment.desc: At the start of your activation, pick a wounded enemy model in base contact. It must pass a Strength test or is immediately removed. One use only.

equipment.name: Throne of Judgement
equipment.desc: The model gains +2 Strength, +2 Toughness, +1 Wound and the ability "Monstrous Infantry". Unique.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Uluméathi Plasma Syphon ˣ
equipment.desc: Enemy models within 18" suffer a -1 penalty to Strength, AP and Damage to weapons with an "Overcharged" profile (applies to all profiles of the affected weapons), to a minimum of 1 each.

equipment.name: Universal anathema ˣ
equipment.desc: All melee weapons of the model gain the Poison(2+) ability.

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Hunter-killer missile
equipment.desc: The model gains a Hunter-killer missile.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.
